simple_types.name: Op_Intrinsic
simple_types.code:
type Op_Intrinsic is
  (Nop, Clear_Error, Words, Print, CR, Print_Stack, Dump_VM);

simple_types.name: VM_Status
simple_types.code:
type VM_Status is
  (Ok,
   Param_Stack_Overflow,
   Param_Stack_Underflow,
   Return_Stack_Overflow,
   Return_Stack_Underflow,
   Word_Space_Exceeded,
   Name_Space_Exceeded,
   Instruction_Space_Exceeded,
   …,
   Syntax_Error);

array_types.name: Cell_Array
array_types.code: type Cell_Array is array (Positive range <>) of Cell;

array_types.name: Instruction_Array
array_types.code: type Instruction_Array is array (Positive range <>) of Instruction_Address;

array_types.name: Word_Array
array_types.code: type Word_Array is array (Word_Index) of Word_Header;

record_types.name: VM

fields.name: Error
fields.description: Index of the top of the parameter stack.  If 0, then the stack is empty.

fields.name: Error_Length
fields.description: Index of the top of the parameter stack.  If 0, then the stack is empty.

fields.name: Params
fields.description: Index of jump-back positions in the instruction list.

fields.name: Returns_Top
fields.description: Terminal input buffer providing a method of communicating text to the VM.

fields.name: TIB
fields.description:
All of the words which this VM understands.  This will include both
builtins, as well as user-defined words.

fields.name: Words
fields.description:
Compiling state only runs immediate words, otherwise it is used to
build words.

fields.name: Compiling
fields.description: Instruction memory of execution tokens used for compiled words.

fields.name: Instructions
fields.description:
Instruction pointer.  Points to the next instruction to execute when
executing the current instruction.

fields.name: IP
fields.description:
The total number of instructions written into the instruction array.
Only this number of instructions are valid and should be run.
This is only updated when exiting compiling mode.

record_types.name: Word_Code
Word_Header

fields.name: Name_Start
fields.description:
Some words use the next value in the instruction list.  This is used
when dumping the VM.

fields.name: Name_End
fields.description:
Some words use the next value in the instruction list.  This is used
when dumping the VM.

fields.name: Code
fields.description:
Some words use the next value in the instruction list.  This is used
when dumping the VM.

fields.name: Immediate
fields.description:
Some words use the next value in the instruction list.  This is used
when dumping the VM.

record_types.name: Word_Table

access_types.name: Op_Procedure
access_types.code:
type Op_Procedure is not null access procedure (V : in out VMS.VM)
with Pre => Is_Running (V);

subtypes.name: Error_Message_Length
subtypes.code: subtype Error_Message_Length is Natural range 0 .. Max_Error_Message_Length;

subtypes.name: Instruction_Address
subtypes.code: subtype Instruction_Address is Cell range 1 .. Max_Instructions;

subtypes.name: Instruction_Count
subtypes.code: subtype Instruction_Count is Cell range 0 .. Max_Instructions;

subtypes.name: Name_Index
subtypes.code: subtype Name_Index is Name_Space_Count range 1 .. Name_Space_Count'Last;

subtypes.name: Name_Space_Count
subtypes.code: subtype Name_Space_Count is Natural range 0 .. Word_Name_Storage_Size;

subtypes.name: Param_Count
subtypes.code: subtype Param_Count is Natural range 0 .. Max_Param_Stack_Size;

subtypes.name: Return_Count
subtypes.code: subtype Return_Count is Natural range 0 .. Max_Return_Stack_Size;

subtypes.name: Word_Count
subtypes.code: subtype Word_Count is Natural range 0 .. Max_Words;

subtypes.name: Word_Index
subtypes.code: subtype Word_Index is Word_Id range 1 .. Max_Words;

subtypes.name: Word_Length
subtypes.code: subtype Word_Length is Positive range 1 .. Max_Word_Length;

subprograms.code: function "=" (A, B : Word_Code) return Boolean

documentation.returns: Can't do equality on access types,
